title: astragalus parnassi subsp. cylleneus
intro: Astragalus parnassi subsp. cylleneus, also known as Cylene's milk-vetch, is a plant species within the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus parnassi subsp. cylleneus are believed to include immune system support, cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Astragalus parnassi subsp. cylleneus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
